nodes.label: AI as creative brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: I use it for brainstorming those names

nodes.label: AI reliability for numerical accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust that the numbers are always accurate from AI

nodes.label: AI as independent task completer for financial tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as collaborative partner for financial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: with financial ones I leave it to complete the task independently

nodes.label: Human personal touch in customer relations
nodes.grounding_span: it will never have the human approach that I do with my customers

nodes.label: Business success through personal connection
nodes.grounding_span: The reason for my success is that people are invested in me, as a person, as well as my business

nodes.label: Financial accuracy and trust
nodes.grounding_span: It is important that those numbers are correct

nodes.label: Creative expression and uniqueness
nodes.grounding_span: unique menu names for my ice cream dishes

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for creative naming success
nodes.grounding_span: it came up with the perfect name after a few rounds of back and forth

nodes.label: Frustration with AI repetitive suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I was frustrated and gave up after it made the same suggestions over and over

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for financial calculations
nodes.grounding_span: I later double-checked to make sure it was accurate (and it was!)

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in customer-facing roles
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think it will ever have the human approach that I do with my customers

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I always have to go back and forth

nodes.label: Domain-specific delegation strategy
nodes.grounding_span: I am more likely to collaborate with creative tasks, and with financial ones I leave it to complete the task independently
